name: hotwire-native-agent-kit
description: Develop, verify, and deploy Rails-powered Hotwire Native apps.

interface.shortDescription: Develop and deploy owned Hotwire Native apps
interface.longDescription: Audit Rails applications, implement Hotwire Native iOS and Android clients, validate navigation, Bridge Components, and push, then prepare owner-controlled iOS environments, signing, CI, and TestFlight distribution.
defaultPrompt: Audit this Rails app for Hotwire Native readiness.
Build the next verified iOS, Android, or push slice.
Diagnose this Hotwire Native bridge failure.
Prepare this owned iOS app for a verified device or TestFlight release.
